title: Node Certificate Expiration Recovery Lab
description: In this lab you will diagnose a worker node that is showing as NotReady due to an expired kubelet client certificate. You will examine the symptoms at the node and pod level, understand how certificate expiration cascades through the cluster, identify the expired certificate, and work through the renewal process to restore node-to-API-server communication. This is a critical recovery skill for Kubernetes administrators responsible for long-running clusters.
